title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
